meta.description: Tracking effort metrics for a future Data is Beautiful post about the job search process

sessions.description: Built recruiter tracker app from scratch. Set up Railway deployment, Node/Express server, authentication, CSV export/import, follow-up date tracking, overdue highlighting.

Completed full recruiter outreach campaign. Researched 9 additional firms, drafted and sent 9 emails, verified LinkedIn profiles for all contacts, discovered Nora Sutherland had moved from DSG to True Search, sent targeted follow-up to her at new firm.

responses.notes: Responded same day. Connected Everett to colleagues. Flagged a President role for March. Everett replied highlighting marketing ownership at ChartRequest.
